title: Sunset Header
description: Schema for representing API deprecation lifecycle data using the Sunset HTTP header field (RFC 8594) and Deprecation HTTP header field (RFC 9745).

endpoint.description: The URI of the API endpoint subject to deprecation.

sunsetDate.description: The date and time when the endpoint will become unresponsive. Corresponds to the value of the Sunset HTTP header (RFC 8594) in ISO 8601 format.

deprecationDate.description: The date and time when the endpoint was or will be deprecated. Corresponds to the Deprecation HTTP header (RFC 9745). Must not be later than sunsetDate if both are present.

sunsetHeaderValue.description: The raw HTTP-date value of the Sunset header as sent in the response (e.g., 'Sat, 31 Dec 2026 23:59:59 GMT').

deprecationHeaderValue.description: The raw structured-date value of the Deprecation header as sent in the response (e.g., '@1688169599').

migrationUrl.description: URL of the migration guide or replacement resource. Communicated via the Link header with rel='sunset' or rel='deprecation'.

replacementEndpoint.description: The URI of the replacement endpoint that consumers should migrate to.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the endpoint. 'active' is fully operational; 'deprecated' is operational but scheduled for retirement; 'sunset' is end-of-life.

linkHeaders.description: Array of Link header values associated with this endpoint's deprecation.
